title: NiSource (NI) Lags Q3 Earnings Estimates, Narrows 2022 View
text: NiSource's (NI) third-quarter revenues are better than expected. The company plans to invest $15 billion in 2023-2027 to strengthen its electric and gas operations.

title: NiSource (NI) Q3 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: NiSource (NI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -9.09% and 9.32%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: NiSource (NI) to Post Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: NiSource's (NI) third-quarter earnings are likely to have benefited from the implementation of new gas rates and the expected reduction in expenses.
